reasoning: In the very short term, the yfinance statistical analysis indicates a slight probability of mean reversion following a recent rapid price increase (from $132 in mid-February to $143.6 in late March), suggesting a sub-0.5 chance of remaining above the $143.60 threshold in the next 1-4 weeks (forecasted at 0.45 and 0.49 for April).
